tours.name: Volcanoes National Park Adventure
tours.description: Experience the majestic mountain gorillas in their natural habitat. This once-in-a-lifetime adventure takes you through the misty mountains of Volcanoes National Park. Trek through the bamboo forest and spend an unforgettable hour with a family of mountain gorillas.
tours.shortDescription: Gorilla trekking adventure in the misty mountains

itinerary.title: Departure from Kigali
itinerary.description: Early morning departure from Kigali. Drive to Volcanoes National Park (2.5 hours). Stop at the park headquarters for briefing. Afternoon cultural village visit.

itinerary.title: Gorilla Trekking
itinerary.description: Early morning breakfast. Head to park headquarters for group assignment. Start gorilla trekking (1-4 hours depending on gorilla movement). Spend 1 hour with the gorillas. Return to lodge and drive back to Kigali.

tours.name: Nyungwe Forest Canopy Walk
tours.description: Walk among the treetops in ancient rainforest. Experience the only canopy walk in East Africa. Suspended 50 meters above the forest floor, this 90-meter bridge offers breathtaking views of the lush rainforest and opportunities to spot monkeys and birds.
tours.shortDescription: Walk among the treetops in ancient rainforest

itinerary.title: Drive to Nyungwe
itinerary.description: Morning departure from Kigali. Drive to Nyungwe Forest (4 hours). Afternoon nature walk and waterfall visit.

itinerary.title: Canopy Walk & Chimpanzee Tracking
itinerary.description: Early morning chimpanzee tracking (optional). Then experience the canopy walk. Return to Kigali in the afternoon.

tours.name: Lake Kivu Escape
tours.description: Relaxing lakeside retreat with water activities. Perfect for unwinding after gorilla trekking. Enjoy boat cruises, kayaking, and beautiful sunsets on one of Africa's great lakes.
tours.shortDescription: Relaxing lakeside retreat with water activities

itinerary.title: Drive to Lake Kivu
itinerary.description: Morning departure from Kigali. Drive to Lake Kivu (3 hours). Check-in at resort. Afternoon at leisure - swimming or beach walk.

itinerary.title: Boat Cruise & Activities
itinerary.description: Morning boat cruise to Napoleon Island. Visit the island and see fruit bats. Afternoon kayaking or swimming.

itinerary.title: Relaxation & Return
itinerary.description: Morning at leisure - enjoy the beach. Afternoon drive back to Kigali.

tours.name: Akagera Safari
tours.description: Big five wildlife experience in savannah. Spot elephants, lions, giraffes, zebras, and more. Enjoy game drives and boat safaris in Rwanda's only savannah park.
tours.shortDescription: Big five wildlife experience in savannah

itinerary.title: Drive to Akagera & Game Drive
itinerary.description: Early morning departure from Kigali. Drive to Akagera National Park (2.5 hours). Check-in and afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Morning Game Drive & Boat Safari
itinerary.description: Early morning game drive. Afternoon boat safari on Lake Ihema. Return to Kigali in the evening.

tours.name: Kigali City Tour
tours.description: Explore Rwanda's vibrant capital city. Visit the Kigali Genocide Memorial, local markets, art galleries, and enjoy panoramic views of the city.

itinerary.title: Kigali City Exploration
itinerary.description: Start at Kigali Genocide Memorial. Visit local markets. Lunch break. Afternoon art galleries and craft village. End at viewpoint overlooking the city.
